resumes.name: Ronak Jain
resumes.raw_resume_text:
Ronak Jain
Houston, TX (Hybrid)   +91 9113975140  ronakpahariya@gmail.com   linkedin.com/in/bernardcale 
ENTERPRISE PROGRAM LEADER | PARTNER & REVENUE OPERATIONS | GOVERNANCE & SCALABLE 
OPERATING MODELS 
Enterprise program and transformation leader with 15+ years of experience designing and 
operationalizing governance frameworks, portfolio prioritization models, and cross-functional 
execution rhythms across retail, supply chain, digital, and enterprise technology environments. 
Specializes in translating commercial and strategic objectives into scalable operating systems   
including intake models, prioritization logic, KPI dashboards, performance tracking, and business-rule 
integration into enterprise platforms. Proven ability to align Legal, Finance, GTM, Product, 
Engineering, and Operations stakeholders while maintaining transparency, compliance, and 
measurable value realization. 
Experienced in B2B and retail ecosystems where automation, auditability, and cross-functional 
coordination are critical to revenue performance and operational integrity. 
 
CORE EXPERTISE 
Partner & Incentive Program Governance 
Revenue Operations & Commercial Frameworks 
Tiering Logic & Eligibility Rule Design 
Portfolio Prioritization & Intake Models 
Cross-Functional Enterprise Alignment 
Business Logic Integration into Systems 
KPI & Performance Dashboard Design 
Process Mapping & Workflow Optimization 
Risk Management & Compliance Controls 
Scaled Agile & Hybrid Delivery Environments 
 
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE 
Enterprise Transformation & Portfolio Program Lead 
Houston, TX | Recent Engagements 
Led enterprise-level portfolio governance, delivery stabilization, and operating model modernization 
initiatives across complex, multi-team environments. 
 
 
Key Contributions: 
  Designed and implemented portfolio intake and prioritization frameworks to align strategic 
objectives with execution capacity and financial constraints. 
  Established governance cadences, escalation pathways, and performance dashboards enabling 
executive visibility into delivery health, value realization, and risk exposure. 
  Embedded structured decision-making and scoring models into Azure DevOps and Jira-based 
environments to improve transparency and accountability. 
  Partnered with Product, Engineering, Finance, and Operations leaders to rationalize 
workstreams, clarify dependency logic, and align resource allocation to highest-value 
initiatives. 
  Developed KPI frameworks tracking throughput, cycle time, budget alignment, and outcome 
realization across multiple teams. 
  Facilitated cross-functional working sessions to eliminate systemic bottlenecks and improve 
execution predictability. 
  Drove adoption of standardized templates, SOPs, and governance models to ensure scalability 
and audit readiness. 
Impact: Increased delivery predictability, improved executive decision-making visibility, and reduced 
misaligned work across enterprise portfolios. 
 
WALGREENS – Program Manager 
Deerfield, IL 
Led enterprise customer contact and campaign governance programs impacting 27M+ households 
and 100M+ outbound communications annually. 
  Designed and operationalized enterprise intake model governing outbound campaigns, 
eligibility logic, prioritization rules, and channel sequencing. 
  Standardized campaign governance framework balancing commercial goals with customer 
experience and compliance requirements. 
  Built KPI dashboards translating customer engagement data into measurable revenue and 
performance insights. 
  Partnered with Marketing, Merchandising, IT, Finance, and Customer Care to embed business 
logic into CRM and campaign systems. 
  Developed SOPs and audit controls ensuring transparency, scalability, and regulatory 
alignment. 
  Led cross-functional coordination supporting a $28M refill reminder infrastructure generating 
$288M in revenue within six months. 
Impact: Established scalable commercial governance model optimizing customer engagement and 
revenue performance. 
 
ACADEMY SPORTS + OUTDOORS – Senior IT Project Manager, eCommerce 
Katy, TX 
Directed cross-functional initiatives across digital commerce, merchandising, supply chain, and 
technology teams. 
  Led multi-team initiatives improving digital platform scalability and peak operational 
readiness. 
  Embedded pricing, merchandising, and inventory business logic into enterprise systems 
supporting revenue growth. 
  Managed governance across scope, schedule, and financial controls with executive reporting 
cadence. 
  Coordinated vendor and third-party integrations supporting online sales ecosystem. 
Impact: Delivered six enterprise initiatives on time and an average of 20% under budget while 
improving digital execution rigor. 
 
ACE HARDWARE – IT Project Manager 
Oak Brook, IL 
Stabilized post-SAP eCommerce and supply chain technology operations. 
  Conducted end-to-end process mapping identifying operational gaps and control weaknesses. 
  Embedded governance structures across onshore/offshore teams to improve release 
predictability. 
  Facilitated sprint and release planning while aligning operational priorities with business 
stakeholders. 
  Developed accountability frameworks and performance metrics to sustain improvements. 
Impact: Restored operational stability and improved cross-functional alignment within retail supply 
chain ecosystem. 
 
SYSCO FOODS – Senior Technical Program Manager (SAP) 
Houston, TX 
  Managed enterprise rollout of pricing engine integrated with SCM and CRM systems. 
  Coordinated cross-system dependencies and stakeholder alignment across supply chain and 
sales. 
  Implemented structured governance across scope, risk, and release management. 
 
Earlier Career: Accenture | Arthur J. Gallagher | Johnson Controls | USG Corporation 
Progressed through roles spanning supply chain, eCommerce, data warehouse, EDI, and enterprise 
systems implementation, building strong foundation in systems thinking, business analysis, and cross-
functional program leadership. 
 
EDUCATION 
MBA – Keller Graduate School of Management 
Master of Project Management 
B.S. Computer Information Systems 
 
TECHNOLOGY & TOOLS 
Azure DevOps | Jira | SAP | CRM Platforms | SCM Systems 
SQL | Oracle | DB2 
Microsoft Project | SharePoint | Visio 
Agile | Scrum | Hybrid Delivery | Process Re-engineering

pre_screen_questions.question_text: Can you describe your experience with test automation frameworks and tools?
pre_screen_questions.pass_criteria: Should demonstrate hands-on experience with automation tools

pre_screen_questions.question_text: How do you approach API testing and what tools have you used?
pre_screen_questions.pass_criteria: Should mention REST Assured, Postman, or similar API testing tools

pre_screen_questions.question_text: Describe your experience with SQL and backend validation testing.
pre_screen_questions.pass_criteria: Should show understanding of database testing and SQL queries

pre_screen_questions.question_text: How do you handle test case design for complex business workflows?
pre_screen_questions.pass_criteria: Should demonstrate systematic approach to test design

pre_screen_questions.question_text: What is your experience with Agile/Scrum testing practices?
pre_screen_questions.pass_criteria: Should show familiarity with iterative development and testing

context.title: IT Quality Assur Anlyt Sr
context.jobdiva_description: We are seeking an experienced IT Quality Assurance Analyst Senior to join our team. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience with test automation frameworks, API testing, SQL and backend validation, and Agile/Scrum methodologies. Responsibilities include designing and executing test cases for complex business workflows, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and ensuring the highest quality standards for our software products.

customer_requirements.value: Must not be employed by: Progressive

other_requirements.value: Must be local to TBD, OH metro
